title.ko: 연소의 조정 또는 제어(연소가 연료나 다른 입자의 유동상에서 발생하는 연소 장치에 특히 적합한 제어장치 F23C 10/28; 고형 연료용의 개방식노를 갖춘 가정용 스토브의, 연소를 조절하기 위한 상태 반응 제어 F24B 1/187)
title.en: REGULATING OR CONTROLLING COMBUSTION (control devices specially adapted for combustion apparatus in which combustion takes place in a fluidised bed of fuel or other particles F23C0010280000;condition responsive controls for regulating combustion in domestic stoves with open fires for solid fuel F24B0001187000)
Regulating fuel supply
conjointly with air supply
conjointly with air supply and with draught
conjointly with draught
conjointly with another medium, e.g. boiler water
and with air supply or draught

title.ko: 공기공급 또는 통풍의 조정(연료공급과 함께 행하는 것 F23N 1/00)
title.en: Regulating air supply or draught (conjointly with fuel supply F23N0001000000)
Regulating draught by direct pressure operation of single valves or dampers
by operation of single valves or dampers by temperature-sensitive elements

title.ko: 2개 이상의 밸브 또는 댐퍼의 결합조작에 의한 것 (전력 보조 시스템에 의한 것 F23N3/08)
title.en: by conjoint operation of two or more valves or dampers  (by power-assisted systems F23N0003080000)
by power-assisted systems

title.ko: 연소제어를 위한 시스템 (연료 공급을 규제하는 것 F23N1/00; 공기 공급 또는 통기를 규제하는 것 F23N3/00)
title.en: Systems for controlling combustion  (regulating fuel supply F23N0001000000; regulating air supply or draught F23N0003000000)
using devices responsive to thermal changes or to thermal expansion of a medium
using bimetallic elements
using bellows; using diaphragms
using light-sensitive elements
using thermocouples
using ionisation-sensitive elements, i.e. flame rods
using thermo-sensitive resistors
using noise-sensitive detectors
using detectors sensitive to rate of flow of air or fuel
with a time program acting through electrical means, e.g. using time-delay relays
with a time program acting through mechanical means, e.g. using cams

title.ko: 이상 또는 바람직하지 않은 사태발생의 예방, 즉 안전장치(F23N 5/02에서 F23N 5/08이 우선)
title.en: Preventing development of abnormal or undesired conditions, i.e. safety arrangements (F23N0005020000-F23N0005180000 take precedence)
Details
